name: Mousse Au Chocolat
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until stiff.
2. Stir the sugar into the egg yolks and beat until creamy.
3. Whip the heavy cream until stiff.
4. Melt both types of chocolate, ensuring it does not exceed 20°C (68°F).
5. Gently stir the melted chocolate into the whipped cream.
6. Gradually add the egg yolks, stirring the egg whites spoon by spoon into the mixture.
7. Refrigerate the Mousse au Chocolat for at least two hours before serving.
